title: taraxacum lucense
intro: Taraxacum lucense, also known as the lesser dandelion or lucens dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus that is native to Europe, Asia, and parts of North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that supports gut health. The health benefits of Taraxacum lucense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lucense can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
